title: 🔎 Final Questions Before We Finalize Version 4.3
content:
🔎 Final Questions Before We Finalize Version 4.3
1. Should XP from the RPG system be redeemable for academic bonuses?
2. Do we want to give students a bonus if they participate in ALL extra credit tasks?
3. Should peer review feedback have a ranking system (gold/silver/bronze) for quality?
4. Where should we place the “Sign & Signifier” lecture? Week 1, or later in the semester?

🚀 Once you approve, we finalize Version 4.3 and move to syllabus drafting!

📌 Version 4.4 – Full Integration of RPG System, Structural Refinements, & Final Open Questions


🚀 Incorporating the RPG framework, meta-theming, alignment system, historical specificity, XP mechanics, peer review ranking, and final adjustments before full lock-in.

1️⃣ RPG Character System – Fully Developed

📜 Students create an avatar based on literary & intellectual archetypes.
✔ Androgynous and customizable (non-gender-specific).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 19 (chunk 19/555)
